languages.original_text: "The mythical kind, shall we say. The subject of my research is an ancient, unusually advanced xenocivilisation. Some among the tech-clergy call them Nephilimechs, believing them to be the first creations of the Omnissiah. Others call them iron anathemas, considering them to be the spawn of Abominable Intelligence. But the initiated know them as Necrons, and believe me, the hand of the Machine God has never touched these monstrous creatures."

languages.text: "Я бы сказал, мифических. Объект моих изысканий — некая древняя необычайно развитая ксеноцивилизация. Некоторые из {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}технодуховенства{/g} зовут их нефилимехами, считая их первыми творениями Омниссии. Иные называют их железными анафемами, считая их порождениями Изуверского Интеллекта. Посвященные же знают их как "некронов", и поверьте, длань Бога-Машины не касалась этих чудовищных созданий".

traits.locale_text: "Я бы сказал, мифических. Объект моих изысканий — некая древняя необычайно развитая ксеноцивилизация. Те из {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}технодуховенства{/g}, что плохо осведомлены о ее существовании, зовут их нефилимехами, считая их первыми творениями Омниссии. Посвященные же знают их как "некронов", и поверьте, длань Бога-Машины не касалась этих чудовищных созданий".

"The mythical kind, shall we say. The subject of my research is an ancient, unusually advanced xenocivilisation. "The mythical kind, shall we say. The subject of my research is an ancient, unusually advanced xenocivilisation. Some among the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}tech-clergy{/g} call them Nephilimechs, believing them to be the first creations of the Omnissiah. Others call them iron anathemas, considering them to be the spawn of Abominable Intelligence. But the initiated know them as Necrons, and believe me, the hand of the Machine God has never touched these monstrous creatures."

languages.text: «Los míticos, se podría decir. El objetivo de mi investigación radica en una xenocivilización ancestral y particularmente avanzada. Algunos miembros del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}tecnoclero{/g} los llaman nefilimecas y piensan que son las primeras creaciones del Omnissiah. Otros los denominan anatemas de hierro y los consideran engendros de Inteligencia Abominable. Pero los iniciados los conocemos como "Necrones", y créame cuando le digo que la mano del Dios Máquina jamás se ha acercado a estas monstruosas criaturas».
languages.original_text: "The mythical kind, shall we say. The subject of my research is an ancient, unusually advanced xenocivilisation. Some among the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}tech-clergy{/g} call them Nephilimechs, believing them to be the first creations of the Omnissiah. Others call them iron anathemas, considering them to be the spawn of Abominable Intelligence. But the initiated know them as Necrons, and believe me, the hand of the Machine God has never touched these monstrous creatures."

traits.locale_text: «Los míticos, se podría decir. El objetivo de mi investigación radica en una xenocivilización ancestral y particularmente avanzada. Algunos miembros del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}tecnoclero{/g} los llaman nefilimecas y piensan que son las primeras creaciones del Omnissiah. Otros los denominan anatemas de hierro y los consideran engendros de Inteligencia Abominable. Pero los iniciados los conocemos como "Necrones", y créame cuando le digo que la mano del Dios Máquina jamás se ha acercado a estas monstruosas criaturas».

languages.text: “姑且算是传说级的吧。我的研究对象，是一个古老的、异常先进的异形文明。一些{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}技术教士{/g}称他们为‘涅菲利姆’，认为他们是欧姆尼赛亚最初的造物。另一些人则称他们为‘钢铁禁忌’，认为他们是憎恶智能的孽种。但了解内情的人称它们为太空死灵，而且，相信我，万机之神的手从未触碰过这些可憎的造物。”
languages.original_text: "The mythical kind, shall we say. The subject of my research is an ancient, unusually advanced xenocivilisation. Some among the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}tech-clergy{/g} call them Nephilimechs, believing them to be the first creations of the Omnissiah. Others call them iron anathemas, considering them to be the spawn of Abominable Intelligence. But the initiated know them as Necrons, and believe me, the hand of the Machine God has never touched these monstrous creatures."

traits.locale_text: “姑且算是传说级的吧。我的研究对象，是一个古老的、异常先进的异形文明。一些{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}技术教士{/g}称他们为‘涅菲利姆’，认为他们是欧姆尼赛亚最初的造物。另一些人则称他们为‘钢铁禁忌’，认为他们是憎恶智能的孽种。但了解内情的人称它们为太空死灵，而且，相信我，万机之神的手从未触碰过这些可憎的造物。”

languages.text: « Le genre... mythique, disons. Le sujet de mes recherches est une xénocivilisation antique et anormalement évoluée. Certains membres du {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}techno-clergé{/g} appellent ses représentants les néphilimechs, les pensant être la première création de l'Omnimessie, tandis que d'autres les appellent les anathèmes de fer et les considèrent comme les rejetons de l'Intelligence Abominable. Mais les initiés les connaissent sous le nom de "Nécrons", et croyez-moi, la main du Dieu-Machine n'a même jamais approché ces monstres infernaux. »
languages.original_text: "The mythical kind, shall we say. The subject of my research is an ancient, unusually advanced xenocivilisation. Some among the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}tech-clergy{/g} call them Nephilimechs, believing them to be the first creations of the Omnissiah. Others call them iron anathemas, considering them to be the spawn of Abominable Intelligence. But the initiated know them as Necrons, and believe me, the hand of the Machine God has never touched these monstrous creatures."

traits.locale_text: « Le genre... mythique, disons. Le sujet de mes recherches est une xénocivilisation antique et anormalement évoluée. Certains membres du {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}techno-clergé{/g} appellent ses représentants les néphilimechs, les pensant être la première création de l'Omnimessie, tandis que d'autres les appellent les anathèmes de fer et les considèrent comme les rejetons de l'Intelligence Abominable. Mais les initiés les connaissent sous le nom de "Nécrons", et croyez-moi, la main du Dieu-Machine n'a même jamais approché ces monstres infernaux. »

languages.text: "Sagen wir, die mythische Art. Das Subjekt meiner Forschung ist eine alte, ungewöhnlich fortschrittliche Xenozivilisation. Einige Mitglieder der {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Techpriesterschaft{/g} bezeichnen sie als Nephilimechs, da sie sie für die ersten Schöpfungen des Omnissiah halten. Andere nennen sie eiserne Anathemata, da sie in ihnen die Brut Abscheulicher Intelligenz sehen. Aber die Eingeweihten kennen sie als 'Necrons' und glaubt mir, die Hand des Maschinengottes hat diese monströsen Kreaturen nie berührt."
languages.original_text: "The mythical kind, shall we say. The subject of my research is an ancient, unusually advanced xenocivilisation. Some among the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}tech-clergy{/g} call them Nephilimechs, believing them to be the first creations of the Omnissiah. Others call them iron anathemas, considering them to be the spawn of Abominable Intelligence. But the initiated know them as Necrons, and believe me, the hand of the Machine God has never touched these monstrous creatures."

traits.locale_text: "Sagen wir, die mythische Art. Das Subjekt meiner Forschung ist eine alte, ungewöhnlich fortschrittliche Xenozivilisation. Einige Mitglieder der {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Techpriesterschaft{/g} bezeichnen sie als Nephilimechs, da sie sie für die ersten Schöpfungen des Omnissiah halten. Andere nennen sie eiserne Anathemata, da sie in ihnen die Brut Abscheulicher Intelligenz sehen. Aber die Eingeweihten kennen sie als 'Necrons' und glaubt mir, die Hand des Maschinengottes hat diese monströsen Kreaturen nie berührt."

languages.text: "神話的 "とでも言おうか。私の研究対象は、古代の異文明である。彼らの存在をほとんど知らない技術神官たちは、彼らをネフィリメクと呼び、全知全能の神の最初の創造物だと信じている。しかし、入門者たちは彼らを "ネクロン "と呼んでいる。"信じてほしい、機械神の手がこの怪物に触れたことは一度もない"
languages.original_text: "The mythical kind, shall we say. The subject of my research is an ancient, unusually advanced xenocivilisation. Tech-Priests who know little of their existence call them Nephilimechs, believing them to be the first creations of the Omnissiah. But the initiated know them as 'Necrons,' and believe me, the hand of the Machine God has never touched these monstrous creatures."

languages.text: "Efsanevi tür diyelim. Araştırmamın konusu kadim, olağan dışı derecede gelişmiş bir zeno medeniyeti. {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Tekno ruhbanlardan{/g} bazıları, onların Hermesih'in ilk yaratımları olduğuna inanarak onlara Nefilimek der. Diğerleri ise Yezit Zekâ'nın dölü olduklarını düşünüp onları demir aforoz ismiyle tanımlar. Ancak belirli seviyede irfan sahipleri onları 'Nekron' olarak bilir. İnanın ki Makine Tanrı'nın eli, bu korkunç yaratıklara asla dokunmamıştır."
languages.original_text: "The mythical kind, shall we say. The subject of my research is an ancient, unusually advanced xenocivilisation.
